---
name: Scoring rule change
about: Propose an evidence-based filter, source, keyword, or weight change
title: "[Scoring]: "
labels: scoring
---

## Current behavior

Identify the current rule, source, keyword, threshold, or configuration field.

## Proposed behavior

## Why it matters

## Public evidence

Provide representative public candidates, including false positives or false negatives. Explain expected score or filter outcomes.

## Risks and tradeoffs

Could this add noise, bias selection, increase API usage, or hide useful projects?

## Test plan

## Checklist

- [ ] Evidence is public and reproducible.
- [ ] The change does not inflate counts for appearance's sake.
- [ ] No private repositories, secrets, or personal data are included.
- [ ] Documentation and configuration impacts are explained.
